formal_rating_rationale: Current launch scope is Steam desktop distribution with content-survey descriptors tracked in release compliance docs. No additional board-rating artifact is required for this scoped release plan; reassessment triggers remain active.
reassessment_triggers: Launch-region expansion with mandatory board rating requirements
Any content update introducing violence, gore, sexual content, drugs/alcohol, gambling, or UGC
Steam policy/rubric changes affecting descriptors or age-gating requirements
New platform release channel outside current Steam desktop scope
